message:
fix(freeze): Add proper fallback functions for all arithmetic/bitwise ops

- Replace incomplete JS_Add/Sub/Mul/Div fallbacks with frozen_* equivalents
- Add fallbacks for mod, and, or, xor, shl, shr (sar), ushr
- Fix neg_op to use frozen_neg instead of returning undefined

All arithmetic and bitwise operations now properly fall back to the
frozen runtime helpers when SINT fast path doesn't apply.
